issues.title: Transaction for JDBC Chat Memory Repository
issues.body:
The new JdbcChatMemoryRepository handles the memory in block. On each update, the memory block is replaced. The sequence of operations used to do that (delete+insert) is not transactional. It should be. 

Version: 1.0.0-RC1

comments.body: Hi @ThomasVitale I've tried adding transaction support for it. Could you please review this PR? https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3158
